title: ohwia luteola
intro: Ohwia luteola, also known as the prickle poppy or prickly poppy, is a perennial plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Ohwia luteola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
